services.title: Cyber Threat Monitoring
services.description: 24/7 real-time monitoring of your digital infrastructure with AI-powered threat detection and instant alerts.

services.title: Incident Response
services.description: Rapid containment and recovery from cyber incidents with our expert response team available around the clock.

services.title: Compliance & Governance
services.description: End-to-end compliance management covering GDPR, HIPAA, SOC 2, and industry-specific regulatory frameworks.

services.title: Asset Recovery
services.description: Digital asset tracing and recovery services for compromised accounts, stolen credentials, and financial fraud.

services.title: Legal Documentation
services.description: Court-ready digital evidence preservation, chain of custody documentation, and expert witness support.

services.title: Alliance Trust Realty
services.description: Secure real estate transactions with cybersecurity-backed title verification and digital escrow protection.

news.title: GEM Launches Advanced Threat Intelligence Platform
news.summary: Our new AI-driven threat intelligence system provides clients with predictive analysis of emerging cyber threats before they impact operations.

news.title: Partnership with Alliance Trust Realty Expands Secure Property Services
news.summary: GEM Assist Enterprise and Alliance Trust Realty announce expanded services for cybersecurity-protected real estate transactions.

news.title: New Compliance Framework for Financial Institutions
news.summary: Updated SOC 2 Type II and FISMA compliance packages now available for banking and financial services clients.

testimonials.name: James R.
testimonials.text: GEM's threat monitoring caught a sophisticated phishing campaign targeting our customers before any damage was done. Exceptional service.

testimonials.name: Patricia W.
testimonials.text: Their compliance team got us to HIPAA certification in record time. The documentation support was thorough and professional.

testimonials.name: Michael T.
testimonials.text: The secure real estate transaction service gave us complete confidence in our property purchase. No fraud concerns whatsoever.
